notes: Runtime failure in production — AI SIEM showed lua_error: 'attempt to call a nil value (method match)'. Root cause: the Observo dataplane passed `timestamp` as a non-string to this script, so `eventTime:match(...)` failed with a method-not-found error when the value resolved to a non-string type.
runtime_error_observed: attempt to call a nil value (method 'match')
